nodes.label: Supply Chain AI Agent System — replenishment to human-controlled.
nodes.norm_label: supply chain ai agent system — replenishment to human-controlled.

nodes.label: Specialist agents (roadmap step 2: split into specialist agents — one job each).
nodes.norm_label: specialist agents (roadmap step 2: split into specialist agents — one job each).

nodes.label: Delivery / DC-planning agent — Plan Delivery. One job: schedule the inbound deli
nodes.norm_label: delivery / dc-planning agent — plan delivery. one job: schedule the inbound deli

nodes.label: Demand agent — Predict. One job: forecast demand from POS sales.
nodes.norm_label: demand agent — predict. one job: forecast demand from pos sales.

nodes.label: Evaluator agent — Evaluate the Workflow (roadmap step 7).  Checks the run for co
nodes.norm_label: evaluator agent — evaluate the workflow (roadmap step 7).  checks the run for co

nodes.label: Exception agent — catch supplier delays / issues early. One job: flag exceptions
nodes.norm_label: exception agent — catch supplier delays / issues early. one job: flag exceptions

nodes.label: Rule-based monitor — fast, deterministic, no LLM needed for alerting triggers.
nodes.norm_label: rule-based monitor — fast, deterministic, no llm needed for alerting triggers.

nodes.label: Inventory agent — Check Stock. One job: turn the forecast into a stock signal.
nodes.norm_label: inventory agent — check stock. one job: turn the forecast into a stock signal.

nodes.label: Procurement agent — Draft Order. One job: turn a stock signal into a draft order
nodes.norm_label: procurement agent — draft order. one job: turn a stock signal into a draft order

nodes.label: Supplier agent — Pick Supplier. One job: choose the best supplier for the order.
nodes.norm_label: supplier agent — pick supplier. one job: choose the best supplier for the order.

nodes.label: Execute — issue the PO if approved, otherwise cancel.
